杜慈拒拜仁為入「廠」？

【now.com體育】杜慈被指已拒絕執教拜仁慕尼黑，為的是到英超入主大球會，有傳在阿仙奴及車路士之間2揀1。

德國《圖片報》爆料，指拜仁慕尼黑已向未有合約在身的杜慈（Thomas Tuchel）拋出橄欖枝，希望對方頂替在球季後就會離任的72歲名帥希歷基斯；後者早前公開表示，杜慈有能力成為自己的接班人。

不過，杜慈不願意留德甲，因此拒絕了拜仁的好意。現時，他正受英超倫敦雙雄阿仙奴及車路士青睞，當中以兵工廠能夠獲得這名44歲少帥的呼聲最高，而他們陣中射手奧巴美揚及攻中米希達利恩，在多蒙特時代時曾為杜慈效力。

阿仙奴新任轉會總監米斯連達亦曾在蜜蜂兵團跟杜慈共事，不過二人甚有牙齒印。米斯連達在去年11月表示：「我本來不想離開多蒙特，但前主帥（杜慈）禁止我進入訓練場，他又下指令不准我跟球員聯絡。」

Lemar hopeful of new Arsenal & Liverpool bids

Lemar admits it was something of a blow not to move to the Premier League but hopes to receive new offers at the end of the season.

Asked if he had any regrets about being denied a transfer, he told Telefoot : "Maybe. I was a little disappointed. Once it's over, it's over, so do not think about it.

"I will keep working hard so these clubs eventually come back in the next transfer window. I am open to all offers. I am a football player, I like football. I do not close any door."

Lemar has made 29 appearances in all competitions in 2017-18, scoring three goals.

Arsene Wenger ready to accept the "consequences" of poor results but hints he has no plans to quit Arsenal

Wenger told beIN Sports: “Look, when you age… you focus on doing well for your club and ignore all the rest.

“The older you get, the more it becomes age discrimination. I accept if the results are not good enough then you have to take the consequences.

“But overall that perpetual thing how long you been at a club, how old you are, I find that a bit difficult to take. But all the rest i have to accept because I am in a public job and have to make results and I accept I will be judged on results.”

Wenger added: “I am maybe naive enough to believe that with the time going on, with perspective and context will stand out what I have done for my club and not so much the result of the last game or how much I will be applauded when I stop one day.

“I’m a little bit fed up of all that modern thing about being completely taking care of image. I’ve always worked my whole life about with the idea of who you are rather than how you look so I’m not too concerned about that.”

德媒爆杜曹唔願做「仁」
來季勢登陸英超做「廠」長

德國兩大足球媒體《圖片報》和《踢球者》同時報道，去年離開多蒙特的教練杜曹雖然現時未有任何職務在身，不過仍受到各大球會的青睞，其中德甲班霸拜仁慕尼黑亦向杜曹開出合約，不過據報已經遭到這位44歲德國教頭拒絕。

報道指杜曹下一季很大機會轉戰英超，並有機會接替雲格擔任阿仙奴領隊，兵工廠今季先後引入米希達利恩和奧巴美揚兩位前多蒙特球員，兩人都曾經與杜曹共事，相信有助這位少帥迅速融入兵工廠。

現時在阿仙奴擔任首席球探的米斯連達曾經在多蒙特與杜曹發生過爭執，不過《踢球者》透露，米斯連達已經向阿仙奴保證，假如杜曹的到阿仙奴擔任領隊的話，他將會與對方冰釋前嫌。
